'''thasudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebrano|zebrano]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebrano|zebrano]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsidith|thæsidith]] || [[word:thæsidij|thæsidij]] || [[word:thæsidish|thæsidish]] || [[word:thæsidi|thæsidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasusuduth|thasusuduth]] || [[word:thasusuduj|thasusuduj]] || [[word:thasusudush|thasusudush]] || [[word:thasusudu|thasusudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasuduth|thasuduth]] || [[word:thasuduj|thasuduj]] || [[word:thasudush|thasudush]] || [[word:thasudu|thasudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasufdufth|thasufdufth]] || [[word:thasufdufj|thasufdufj]] || [[word:thasufdufsh|thasufdufsh]] || [[word:thasufduf|thasufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasuduthu|thasuduthu]] || [[word:thasuduju|thasuduju]] || [[word:thasudushu|thasudushu]] || [[word:thasuduku|thasuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasuduth|thasuduth]] || [[word:thasuduj|thasuduj]] || [[word:thasudush|thasudush]] || [[word:thasudu|thasudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasuduthul|thasuduthul]] || [[word:thasudujul|thasudujul]] || [[word:thasudushul|thasudushul]] || [[word:thasudukul|thasudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasuduuthuthu|thasuduuthuthu]] || [[word:thasuduujuju|thasuduujuju]] || [[word:thasuduushushu|thasuduushushu]] || [[word:thasuduuku|thasuduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasuduthun|thasuduthun]] || [[word:thasudujun|thasudujun]] || [[word:thasudushun|thasudushun]] || [[word:thasudukun|thasudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasuduthuoro|thasuduthuoro]] || [[word:thasudujuoro|thasudujuoro]] || [[word:thasudushuoro|thasudushuoro]] || [[word:thasudukuoro|thasudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
